sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרינה שׁריה שׁרין שׁריון

Transliteration: shiryôn shiryân shiryâh shiryônâh

Phonetic: shir-yone'

BDB Definition:

  1. body armour
  2. a weapon
    1. perhaps a lance, javelin

Origin: from H8281 in the original sense of turning

TWOT entry: 2466a,2465a

Part(s) of speech: Noun
